# Copilot instructions

Read [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) before making changes.

- Expo 54 + React Native; platform viz files are `*.tsx` (Skia) and `*.web.tsx` (canvas).
- Run `npm run typecheck` and relevant tests; full-screen viz starts paused.
- Smallest correct diff; no drive-by refactors.
- OEIS data: `npm run build:db` produces `assets/oeis.db`.
